sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT leftPad(value, 5, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings)) FROM test_strings;
SELECT leftPad(leftPad(value, 10), 12, '*') AS padded_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_strings) AS subquery;
SELECT id, leftPad(value, 10, 'x') || '!' AS padded_value FROM test_strings WHERE id > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings) / 2;
SELECT leftPad(value, 9, 'abc')) AS padded_value FROM test_strings HAVING padded_value LIKE '%x%%';
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num1 Int32, num2 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num1;
SELECT leftPad(num1 - num2, 4) FROM (SELECT num1, num2 FROM test_numbers) WHERE num1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT leftPad(value, 8, '0') FROM test_strings WHERE leftPad(value, 3) != '' AND id <= 3;
